title: Rust coverage uplift: github_security_sync module
description: Target rust/src/github_security_sync.rs (~46.18%, ~697 uncovered lines). Add focused tests for mapping/indexing/error branches and sync edge paths to materially raise line coverage.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Coverage progress (actual implementation landed):
- Added 7 focused unit tests in rust/src/github_security_sync.rs covering: manifest task creation path, existing initiative/epic selection logic, beads dry-run task + initiative/epic flows, dependabot epic configured/existing preference, and priority conversion error path.
- Validation: cargo test --locked --lib github_security_sync::tests:: -> 19 passed, 0 failed.
- Re-ran full rust llvm-cov and regenerated coverage-rust/cobertura.xml.
- Module delta: github_security_sync.rs improved from 46.18% to 66.86% line coverage (1025/1533).
- Overall Rust line coverage now 82.63%.
